title: User guide — docs/user-guides/US-0006.md (USER_GUIDE_MODE=1)
description: Create docs/user-guides/US-0006.md documenting the local agent-driven UAT flow. Schema: Purpose, Prerequisites, Usage steps, Example, Limitations, Troubleshooting. Document dev-environment.json fields, agent workflow (launch → health poll → browser probe → evidence), compose details, cross-references to architecture US-0006 and decisions DEC-0018/DEC-0019.
notes: USER_GUIDE_MODE=1 is enabled. Guide covers ephemeral local launch (no persistence beyond ./data), port 3001 must be free, production unaffected. Troubleshooting: port conflict, .env missing, image build failure, health timeout.
